Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the Codebook contains one entry for each variable in the Plan characteristics file. Each entry contains 
variable details to facilitate the understanding and use of the variables. 

AIP_INDICATOR 

LABEL: Applicable Integrated Plan Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether a dual eligible special needs plan (D-SNP) is an Applicable
